calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-05-2010 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2010 Continued To May-17-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-11-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Vicki Gross, #.

Arthur V. Pearson, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Najib Deeb Batshon who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Maher Muhawieh, an individual.
Default was entered against defendant on August 21, 2009. Amended Default was entered against defendant on January 4, 2010.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendants Paul I. Totah, an individual, and Totah Accounting, Inc., were filed on February 4, 2010.
Doe defendants were dimissed today, February 11, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Earlie B. McCraw, and against the Defaulted Defendant the Budd Company as follows:

Damages/Principal - $1,720,000.00.
Interest - $302,295.79.
Attorney Fees - $24,000.00.
Costs - $1,763.68, for a total judgment in the amount of $2,048,059.47.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-21-2010 Continued To Feb-11-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Feb-16-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
